creator: lampa@fee.vutbr.cz
text:
The definition of CHAR_MAX/MIN in /usr/include/machine/limits.h
(sys/i386/limits.h) doesn't reflect -funsigned-char compile switch ...

Fix: 

#  ifdef __CHAR_UNSIGNED__
#   define CHAR_MIN     0
#   define CHAR_MAX     UCHAR_MAX
#  else
#   define CHAR_MIN     SCHAR_MIN
#   define CHAR_MAX     SCHAR_MAX
#  endif
